recommendations.title: Magical Mystery Tour
recommendations.overview: While on a coach tour, The Beatles and a few dozen friends experience strange happenings caused by magicians.
recommendations.director: Ringo Starr, George Harrison, Paul McCartney, Bernard Knowles, John Lennon

recommendations.title: Charming
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Romance
recommendations.overview: Three fairy tale princesses find themselves engaged to the same guy, Prince Charming.

recommendations.title: KPop Demon Hunters
recommendations.overview: When K-pop superstars Rumi, Mira and Zoey aren't selling out stadiums, they're using their secret powers to protect their fans from supernatural threats.

recommendations.title: The Maker
recommendations.overview: A strange creature races against time to make the most important and beautiful creation of his life.

recommendations.title: Moana 2
recommendations.overview: After receiving an unexpected call from her wayfinding ancestors, Moana journeys alongside Maui and a new crew to the far seas of Oceania and into dangerous, long-lost waters for an adventure unlike anything she's ever faced.
recommendations.director: Dana Ledoux Miller, David G. Derrick Jr., Jason Hand

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Prince Achmed
recommendations.overview: Taken from The Arabian Nights, a wicked sorcerer and the beautiful prince Achmed battle one against the other during a series of wondrous adventures.

recommendations.title: Lorenzo
recommendations.genres: Animation, Comedy, Family, Fantasy, Music, Horror
recommendations.overview: A cat named Lorenzo is dismayed to discover that his tail has developed a personality of its own.

recommendations.title: Soul

recommendations.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
recommendations.overview: When Bodi and his band 'True Blue' leave Snow Mountain to tour with pop sensation Lil' Foxy, they learn that fame comes at a price.

recommendations.title: Blue's Big City Adventure
recommendations.overview: When Josh gets the opportunity of a lifetime to audition for Rainbow Puppy’s Broadway musical, Josh and Blue skidoo to NYC for the very first time where they meet new friends and discover the magic of music, dance, and following one’s dreams.
